title: Diplotaxis cinerea
taxonomy: Diplotaxis cinerea is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This classification places it among other plants such as broccoli, cauliflower, and kale. Diplotaxis cinerea is further classified within the genus Diplotaxis, which contains about 35 species of plants. The genus Diplotaxis is a part of the tribe Brassiceae, which includes various mustard and cabbage species. This classification provides an understanding of the plant's evolutionary relationships and taxonomic position within the plant kingdom.
